name: Rosie Worktree Upkeep Review
description: Run the Rosie lane upkeep loop with explicit sync, logging, and review gates.

notes: Pause for AJ review before any history-altering lane-to-main integration.
Record lane scope, affected IDs, and validation status in partner and gardening logs.
If lane/main sync conflicts appear, stop and present a bounded resolution plan before applying edits.
If laneBranch or integrationBranch differ from approved scope, stop and request AJ confirmation before proceeding.
